query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "many-shot cot-icl: making in-context learning truly learn" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it establishes the empirical baseline and mechanism for "Many-Shot In-Context Learning," which is the core subject of the user's follow-up research. Although the user specifically mentions "CoT" (Chain-of-Thought) and "linguistics," this paper is the foundational work on the many-shot regime that the user's paper extends, and it explicitly investigates "Reinforced ICL" using model-generated rationales (CoT) as a primary variable.
